productDisplayName: ADIDAS Originals Women Rekapi Black Casual Shoes
description: Blending the best of adidas' historic Rekord and Okapi silhouettes, the Rekapi from the adidas originals collection comes through as a simple, low cut shoe with a contemporary outsole design, making for a fabulous casual wear.UpperSynthetic leather upper with a suede heel cupContrast coloured patented adidas 3-Stripes on the sidesLacing system for a snug, customised FitPadded collar and tongue for optimum fitMesh inner lining with a padded footbed for all-day comfortMidsoleMoulded midsole detailing for vintage style and lightweight comfortOutsoleTPR outsole with ridges that have herringbone grooves for absolute durability, grip and tractionShoe careClean the upper using a suede brush and dry, clean clothDo not store in direct sunlight
